textByHash.97bb052cd61646868d8c2d0afee36b07bbe4291c: How can I help you, human?
textByHash.31b1ff50b17747720bf1ca9c9ed7c5a4ad7c79fd: Here you go. That's all the ore I have for you.
textByHash.61da064783e8551242c97cf416ffcf0f5118fa59: None of the ore here is yours, sorry.
textByHash.bc29ae67f41870075e32e359d89e6c6679648a88: Okay, first you need dynamite. That's got three ingredients...
textByHash.dbc1035f3e8b40f6860204408c01a7bedc96e848: Once you've got dynamite, use a chisel to excavate a cavity in the hard rock walls, so you can put the dynamite in, then light the fuse.
textByHash.f0df6ac5435a373d2aa47b2b0a7e0e489eafae80: The dynamite blows ore out of the hard rock. It's very unstable, so you don't have long to get it cleaned before it disintegrates.
textByHash.6ddfc7ef034574cfd7c060075ee338f45005bb4c: Just deposit it into the sack upstream, and my colleague will get it cleaned safely. You can collect your cleaned ore from me.
textByHash.e3296ca06cd2069f2412920392d7df7f8583f49d: I work here, in the blast mine. It's a valuable source of minerals for the kingdom, so our work is very important.
textByHash.42654ecb0098389bfc17fd6ab63c59cd28e0203d: The ore from the blast mines is unstable, and needs washing quickly before it disintegrates, so the Lovakengj engineers invented this machine to clean it.
textByHash.4edf46761642508d1f249bb4ca6d41ec40187f82: The design's a secret; even if someone tried to copy it, they'd never get it quite right. I bet their machine would break down all the time.
